main.header: Building the Future of Bitcoin in Portugal

newsletter.title: Newsletter
newsletter.description: Sign up to receive the latest policy analysis, news, and original research.
newsletter.descriptionFooter: Receive our newsletter in your inbox
newsletter.error: Error subscribing. Please try again later.

lead.title: Lead
lead.description: Act as the leading voice for Bitcoin in Portugal and promote its adoption and use as an innovative, decentralized, and secure technology.

influence.title: Influence
influence.description: Regularly engage with legislators and regulators to influence and advise on the development of Bitcoin-friendly laws.

sovereignty.title: Sovereignty
sovereignty.description: Promote individual sovereignty and national resilience through Bitcoin custody, empowering Portuguese citizens and businesses to face global economic challenges.

education.title: Education
education.description: Create and share educational material about Bitcoin, the political and economic landscape around it, and the technology that makes the network possible.

inclusion.title: Inclusion
inclusion.description: Ensure that all citizens and businesses benefit from Bitcoin as an emerging and disruptive technology.

community.title: Community
community.description: Foster active engagement with Bitcoin users, developers, organizations, and enthusiasts in Portugal.

research.title: Research
research.description: We explore the potential of Bitcoin as a strategic asset and disruptive technology, promoting innovative studies to position Portugal at the forefront of the digital economy.

education.title: Education
education.description: We inspire the adoption of Bitcoin through educational programs, practical training, and accessible materials, promoting financial literacy for the digital age.

news.title: News
news.description: We share the most relevant news from the Bitcoin ecosystem, community updates, and developments from our project, keeping you informed about everything that matters in the world of digital currency.
news.empty: No news to show right now. Check back soon!

join.mission: As a non-profit organization, we rely on donations to help us fulfill our mission.

promote.text: knowledge, education, and informed debate about Bitcoin in Portugal in an independent and non-partisan way.

establish.text: ourselves as the national reference institute for Bitcoin education, research, and public policy.

accelerate.text: Bitcoin adoption in Portugal and across Europe through rigorous information and dialogue with companies and institutions.

engage.text: with government, regulators, businesses, and citizens in a pedagogical manner to clarify technical issues and promote well-founded policies.

join.orgInfo: The Portuguese Bitcoin Institute is a non-profit association registered under the name Associação IPBitcoin and has the corporate entity number 519024427.
join.supportImpact: Your support powers the research that drives education that empowers regular people, lawmakers, and the direct engagement that shapes outcomes. With your help, we can protect individual liberty, strengthen democracy, and secure Portugal's leadership in the digital age.
join.donationsDescription: Choose the type and method of donation you prefer to support the IPB. Donations can be anonymous or identified.
join.anonymousNotice: Anonymous donations have a maximum limit of €300 per year (one-time and recurring). No personal information will be requested.
join.fiatDescription: Simple and secure for one-time or recurring gifts.
join.ceilingWarning: Anonymous donations cannot exceed €300 per year.
join.memberDescription: The annual membership fee is €250 per year. You can pay in full or split into 12 monthly instalments. Payment is exclusively in fiat (card).

benefits.memberCard: Official IPB member card sent by mail
benefits.exclusiveNetwork: Exclusive network of national and international members and partners

join.successMember: Thank you! Your membership registration was completed successfully.
join.cancelled: Payment cancelled. You can try again.
join.errorPayment: Error processing payment. Please try again.
join.errorMember: Error processing registration. Please try again.
join.disclaimer: The IPB ensures that funds will be used solely in alignment with its mission and will not support political candidates or their parties.
